title: Google Chrome security advisory (AV26-593)
description:
Serial number: AV26-593Date: June 12, 2026
On June 11, 2026, Google published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following product:
products: Stable Channel Chrome for Desktop  versions prior to0.7827.114/.115 (Windows/Mac), and 149.0.7827.114 (Linux)
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
